notes:
A little above average for home-made espresso, but nowhere near the quality of some cafes like Mast. Tastes burnt and slightly bitter, no freshness (likely bc beans have been sitting for a while). 
For reference, my best home espresso would likely score 85-90.

Added milk bc I’m a latte girly~
Thought I would dislike it, but I actually still really like it. It’s not as good as some light roasts I’ve tried recently (Ethiopia and Guatemala come to mind) but not bad for a dark roast!
Used to be a favorite, now it just tastes burnt. Oof.
Better than last time but still tastes too roasted for me
Maybe not a big fan of dark roasts anymore
Made a cortado!
Not as good as my first brew, but still low acidity despite light roast
Really good cup. It’s got strong floral accents, almost like tea, while not being overbearing or acidic like other light roasts
Not as flavorful as the Aeropress, but maybe cleaner? Still tastes really good.
Didn’t notice as much flavor today
n/a (forgot to write notes)
Also tried a minute bloom. Less flavor than grind @ 75
Goddamn. Maybe will try again once toothpaste runs out but so good.
Wow. I can’t believe how… astringent? Sour? This brew is. Definitely stick to higher brew temps.
Much better than I remember. More acidic than my preference, but really nice mouthfeel, with some citrus tones?
Too many earthy tones. Slightly too acidic/sour for me. I can see why some like it, but not really for me
More sour
Lower temperature definitely helps medium roasts. Will have to try more
More sour, “earthy”, than Ehtiopia. Generally am not a fan of earthy tones. It did taste better when cupped properly, but for drinking? Eh
Not too sour, not too bitter (I think). Will have to add more flavor notes when it cools
Not a fan of this bean lol
Much better than normal! I think the lower temp helps
Earthy tones, nutty;  Generally not my preferred type of light/medim roast. But it’s growing on me.
Tasted bitter
I’m liking Peru more overtime. What’s going on?
Much better at lower temp
At least a 90. The fruity notes certainly come through
The notes didn’t come through has much as when ground at 80.
Returned to 80 on the K6, tastes just like the 12-19 brew! Definitely better than 12/20; wonder if it’ll be better at 75 and lower temp (maybe 93?) or espresso
Extremely sour
Used manual tamp instead of regular; try Niche9 next time?
Better, but beans taste underdeveloped. Should wait a bit longer.
